# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.

Prevent api gateway security.
# Category: api_gateway_security

- 200
        - 301
        - 404
      content_type:
        - application/json
      cache_ttl: 300
      strategy: memory
      memory:
        dictionary_name: kong_db_cache

  - name: proxy-cache
    service: order-service
    route: order-list
    config:
      request_method:
        - GET
      response_code:
        - 200
      content_type:
        - application/json
      cache_ttl: 60
      strategy: memory

  # File Log for Audit
  - name: file-log
    service: payment-service
    config:
      path: /var/log/kong/payment-audit.log
      reopen: true

  # TCP Log for centralized logging
  - name: tcp-log
    config:
      host: logstash.example.com
      port: 5000
      timeout: 10000
      keepalive: 60000
      tls: true
      tls_sni: logstash.example.com

  # StatsD for metrics
  - name: statsd
    config:
      host: statsd.example.com
      port: 8125
      metrics:
        - name: request_count
          stat_type: counter
          sample_rate: 1
        - name: latency
          stat_type: timer
        - name: request_size
          stat_type: counter
          sample_rate: 1
        - name: status_count
          stat_type: counter
          sample_rate: 1
        - name: unique_users
          stat_type: set
      prefix: kong

  # Zipkin for distributed tracing
  - name: zipkin
    config:
      http_endpoint: http://zipkin.example.com:9411/api/v2/spans
      sample_ratio: 0.1
      include_credential: true
      traceid_byte_count: 16
      header_type: preserve
      default_header_type: b3
      tags_header: Zipkin-Tags

  # Request Debugging (disabled in production)
  - name: request-debug
    enabled: false
    config:
      log_body: true
      log_headers: true
